title: TRI-27 Bit Field Overlap Bug — Hybrid Encoding Fix

problem.summary: Bit 17 overlap between src1 and immediate fields caused instruction encoding corruption
problem.discovery: SHR instruction `SHR t0, t0, 16` returned 0 instead of 8
problem.root_cause: Original encoding placed src1 at bits 13-17 and immediate at bits 17-31, sharing bit 17

steps: Created test_shr_parse2.zig to isolate encoding issue
Found encoded word for SHR had src1=16 instead of 0

solution.name: Hybrid Encoding Scheme
solution.description: Split encoding based on instruction type

implementation.key_change: Check has_imm vs has_src2 to determine bit layout

lessons_learned: Bit field overlap is subtle — exhaustive testing needed
ISA documentation must match implementation exactly
Hybrid encoding preserves functionality for both instruction types
15-bit immediate range sufficient for most use cases
